title: Mr. Honey's Large Business Dictionary (English-German)
summaries: "Mr Honey's Large Business Dictionary (English-German)" by Winfried Honig is a reference guide compiled in the early 21st century. This dictionary serves as a bilingual resource, featuring a comprehensive compilation of business-related phrases in both English and German, making it particularly useful for learners and professionals in the international business community.   The opening of the dictionary introduces the purpose and background of the work, highlighting that Winfried Honig, affectionately referred to as Mr. Honey, began compiling this resource in the 1970s. The text emphasizes the author's goals of aiding students and professionals in understanding business language and supporting educational efforts to foster proficiency in English and German business communications. The initial parts also detail the dictionary's organization, noting its arrangement for ease of use by both English and German speakers, underscoring its aim to facilitate clear understanding across linguistic barriers in the business world.
